Linie 290 Kaiserbäder-Linie: Ahlbeck Grenze - Heringsdorf - Bansin, Bahnhof

910 913

Schule

900

Ahlbeck Grenze....................... ab 8:00 8:30 8:40 9:00 9:20 9:30 9:40 10:00 10:20 10:30 10:40 11:00 11:20 11:30 11:40 12:00 12:20 12:30 12:40 13:00 13:20 13:30 13:40 Ahlbeck Supermarkt................ 8:03 8:33 8:43 9:03 9:23 9:33 9:43 10:03 10:23 10:33 10:43 11:03 11:23 11:33 11:43 12:03 12:23 12:33 12:43 13:03 13:23 13:33 13:43

Ahlbeck Bahnhof..................... Ahlbeck Pommernhalle...........

8:06 8:36 8:46 9:06 9:26 9:36 9:46 10:06 10:26 10:36 10:46 11:06 11:26 11:36 11:46 12:06 12:26 12:36 12:46 13:06 13:26 13:36 13:46 8:07 8:37 8:47 9:07 9:27 9:37 9:47 10:07 10:27 10:37 10:47 11:07 11:27 11:37 11:47 12:07 12:27 12:37 12:47 13:07 13:27 13:37 13:47

Ahlbeck Strandstrasse............ Ahlbeck Strandpromenade......

8:08 8:38 8:48 9:08 9:28 9:38 9:48 10:08 10:28 10:38 10:48 11:08 11:28 11:38 11:48 12:08 12:28 12:38 12:48 13:08 13:28 13:38 13:48 8:09 8:39 8:49 9:09 9:29 9:39 9:49 10:09 10:29 10:39 10:49 11:09 11:29 11:39 11:49 12:09 12:29 12:39 12:49 13:09 13:29 13:39 13:49

Linie 290 Kaiserbäder-Linie: Ahlbeck Grenze - Heringsdorf - Bansin, Bahnhof

Ahlbeck Grenze....................... ab 8:00 8:30 8:40 9:00 9:20 9:30 9:40 10:00 10:20 10:30 10:40 11:00 11:20 11:30 11:40 12:00 12:20 12:30 12:40 13:00 13:20 13:30 13:40
